finding_results.notes: Recast the cited clipped inventory bursts and route summaries into complete narrative sentences while preserving the pressured tempo. Also normalized adjacent fragment-style narration around the same beats so the chapter now aligns with the constitution's anti-clipping rule.

Replaced the abstract end recap with a new concrete consequence: the school issues a paired-release dismissal card, the aide confirms it was pushed automatically, and Ben keeps it because rejecting it would punish Leela at pickup.

summary: Revised chapter 3 to remove clipped narration, keep the household-pressure logic legible, and end on a concrete school-side escalation instead of a second abstract summary.
